title: dortmanna thermalis
intro: Dortmanna thermalis, also known as the Dortmann's thermal or Thermopsis divaricarpa, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna thermalis, such as tea or tinctures, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
